zh.lifeSummary: 當Dervorguilla Galloway於大約1195年出生在英國越可爾可納雷斯波洛時，她的父親Roland MacUchtred of Galloway33歲，母親Elena de Morville31歲。她於1209年之後與Nicholas de Stuteville在英國波藍德結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1241年12月18日在英國盧特藍德森丁享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dervorguilla Galloway于大约1195年出生在英国越可爾可納雷斯波洛时，她的父亲Roland MacUchtred of Galloway33岁，母亲Elena de Morville31岁。她于1209年之后与Nicholas de Stuteville在英国波藍德结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1241年12月18日在英国盧特藍德森丁享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Galloway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Galloway in southwest Scotland, named as ‘place of the foreign Gaels’, from Gaelic gall ‘foreigner’ + Gaidheal ‘Gael’. From the 8th century or before it was a province of Anglian Northumbria. In the 9th century it was settled by mixed Gaelic-Norse inhabitants from the Hebrides and Isle of Man.

variants.name: Gallaway
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Galloway  .

variants.name: Galway
meanings: Irish and Scottish: in most cases, probably a variant of Scottish   Galloway  , rather than from the city or county in Connacht (habitational names are rare in Ireland). During the Middle Ages Galways were wealthy merchants on the south coast of Ireland, but now the name there is largely confined to Ulster.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Dervorguilla Galloway was born about 1195, in Knaresborough, Yorkshire, England, her father, Roland MacUchtred of Galloway, was 33 and her mother, Elena de Morville, was 31. She married Nicholas de Stuteville after 1209, in Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 18 December 1241, in Whissendine, Rutland, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dervorguilla Galloway est née environ 1195, à Knaresborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Roland MacUchtred of Galloway, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elena de Morville, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas de Stuteville après 1209, à Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 décembre 1241, à Whissendine, Rutland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dervorguilla Galloway um 1195 in Knaresborough, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roland MacUchtred of Galloway 33 und ihre Mutter Elena de Morville 31. Sie hat nach 1209 in Cumberland, England Nicholas de Stuteville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Dezember 1241 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Whissendine, Rutland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dervorguilla Galloway è nata il circa 1195 nel Knaresborough, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Roland MacUchtred of Galloway, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Elena de Morville, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas de Stuteville dopo il 1209, nel Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 18 dicembre 1241, nel Whissendine, Rutland, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dervorguilla Gallowayが約1195年にイギリスヨークシュアイアナレスボロウで生まれた時，父Roland MacUchtred of Gallowayは33歳，母Elena de Morvilleは31歳であった。1209年以後にイギリスクウンバーランドでNicholas de Stutevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1241年12月18日にイギリスルトランドウィセンディンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dervorguilla Galloway(이)가 대략 1195년 영국 요르크실르 나레스버루에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roland MacUchtred of Galloway(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elena de Morville(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1209년 이후 영국 쿠벌랜드에서 Nicholas de Stuteville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 12월 18일 영국 루틀랜드 위센딘에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.East Riding, Yorkshire, England: Cleveland, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dervorguilla Galloway nasceu aproximadamente 1195, em Knaresborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roland MacUchtred of Galloway, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elena de Morville, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas de Stuteville após 1209, em Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de dezembro de 1241, em Whissendine, Rutland, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dervorguilla Galloway родилась около 1195 г. в местности наресбороую, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roland MacUchtred of Galloway было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elena de Morville, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas de Stuteville после 1209 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 декабря 1241 г. в местности уиссенден, рутланд, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dervorguilla Galloway nació aproximadamente 1195, en Knaresborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roland MacUchtred of Galloway, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Elena de Morville, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Nicholas de Stuteville después de 1209, en Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de diciembre de 1241, en Whissendine, Rutland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
